title: Fans Speculate August 7 as Possible Date for Third GTA 6 Trailer
summary: Grand Theft Auto 6 fans believe that August 7, 2026 could mark the release of the third trailer, coinciding with Take-Two's quarterly earnings call. Speculation centers on the unusual timing of the earnings report being released before market open rather than after close, which some interpret as suggesting major news. Others hope for both a cinematic trailer in late July and a gameplay-focused trailer on August 7.

title: Take-Two Confirms August 7 Earnings Call Following GTA 6 Pre-Order Launch
summary: Take-Two Interactive announced its Q1 2027 earnings report will be released on August 7, 2026, marking the first financial update following the opening of GTA 6 pre-orders. The report will contain results through June 30, 2026. Unusually, the report will be released before markets open rather than after close, similar to when Red Dead Redemption 2 was delayed.

title: Australian Players Required to Complete Age Verification for GTA 6
summary: Australian players will need to verify their age using identification such as a driver's license or government ID before accessing GTA 6 due to the country's Online Safety Act. The legislation requires age checks for content rated R18+ and non-compliance could result in fines up to $49.5 million AUD for Rockstar. It remains unclear if this applies to single-player mode, online mode, or both.

title: Rockstar Developers Threaten Strike Action During GTA 6 Final Development
summary: Developers at Rockstar Games in the UK are planning to unionize and potentially strike during the final crunch period before GTA 6's November release. The Independent Workers' Union of Great Britain will represent workers at Rockstar facilities in Edinburgh, Dundee, Lincoln, Leeds, and London, focusing on issues including overtime, pay transparency, and flexible working arrangements.

title: GTA Online Receives Major Kortz Center Heist Update in July 2026
summary: Rockstar Games announced a significant new update for GTA Online launching in July 2026, featuring The Kortz Center Heist. The multi-stage heist involves infiltrating and escaping from an art gallery, with players needing to add an Art Studio to their Mansion property. The update also includes special rewards, discounts, and new Fine Collector Art program options.
